query: SELECT c.id, c.contactName, c.contactPhone, c.teamMemberId, c.status, c.classification, c.callType, c.ghlCallId, c.batchDialerCallId, c.createdAt, c.duration FROM calls c WHERE c.contactName IN ('Charles Lester', 'Russell Stansberry') ORDER BY c.contactName, c.createdAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT c.id, c.contactName, c.contactPhone, c.teamMemberId, c.status, c.classification, c.callType, c.ghlCallId, c.batchDialerCallId, c.createdAt, c.duration FROM calls c WHERE c.contactName IN ('Charles Lester', 'Russell Stansberry') ORDER BY c.contactName, c.createdAt DESC;
